/usr/bin/cc -flto -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/test_quickjs.dir/__/content/handlers/javascript/quickjs/qjs.c.o CMakeFiles/test_quickjs.dir/__/content/handlers/javascript/quickjs/timers.c.o CMakeFiles/test_quickjs.dir/__/content/handlers/javascript/quickjs/navigator.c.o CMakeFiles/test_quickjs.dir/__/content/handlers/javascript/quickjs/location.c.o CMakeFiles/test_quickjs.dir/__/content/handlers/javascript/quickjs/document.c.o CMakeFiles/test_quickjs.dir/__/content/handlers/javascript/quickjs/storage.c.o CMakeFiles/test_quickjs.dir/__/content/handlers/javascript/quickjs/event_target.c.o CMakeFiles/test_quickjs.dir/__/content/handlers/javascript/quickjs/xhr.c.o CMakeFiles/test_quickjs.dir/__/__/quickjs/console.c.o CMakeFiles/test_quickjs.dir/__/__/quickjs/window.c.o CMakeFiles/test_quickjs.dir/test_quickjs.c.o -o test_quickjs  -Wl,-rpath,/app/build/src:/app/build/contrib/libcss:/app/build/contrib/libnsgif:/app/build/contrib/libnsbmp:/app/build/contrib/libsvgtiny:/app/build/contrib/libdom:/app/build/contrib/libhubbub:/app/build/contrib/libparserutils:/app/build/contrib/libnsutils:/app/build/contrib/quickjs-ng -lcrypto -lpng16 -lcurl -ljpeg -lwebp -lavif -lpsl -lz -lssl -lutf8proc -lcheck_pic -lrt -lm -lsubunit ../libwisp.so.1 ../../contrib/libcss/libcss.so.1 ../../contrib/libnsgif/libnsgif.so.1 ../../contrib/libnsbmp/libnsbmp.so.1 ../../contrib/libsvgtiny/libsvgtiny.so.1 ../../contrib/libdom/libdom.so.1 ../../contrib/libhubbub/libhubbub.so.1 ../../contrib/libparserutils/libparserutils.so.1 -lxml2 ../../contrib/libnsutils/libnsutils.so.1 -lcrypto -lpng16 -lcurl -ljpeg -lwebp -lavif -lpsl -lz -lssl -lutf8proc ../../contrib/quickjs-ng/libqjs.so.0.11.0 -ldl -lm
